title: Theme Park Tickets
scene: 你在主题乐园门口买票入园。

turns.cn: 单日票还是两日票？
turns.en: One-day or two-day ticket?

turns.cn: 单日，两位成人一位儿童。
turns.en: One day. Two adults and one child.

turns.cn: 儿童多高？一米二以下免费。
turns.en: How tall is the child? Under four feet rides free.

turns.cn: 刚好一米二，要买票吗？
turns.en: Exactly four feet. Do we need a ticket?

turns.cn: 门口量一下，可能按儿童价。
turns.en: We'll measure at the gate. Might qualify for child pricing.

turns.cn: 地图和快速通在哪拿？
turns.en: Where do we get a map and express pass?

turns.cn: 入园后左手边游客中心。
turns.en: Guest services on your left after you enter.

title: Waiting in Line
scene: 热门过山车排队两小时，工作人员说明情况。

turns.cn: 目前等待约一百二十分钟。
turns.en: The wait is about a hundred twenty minutes right now.

turns.cn: 快速通还要额外买吗？
turns.en: Do we need to buy express access separately?

turns.cn: 对，或者下午四点后人少一些。
turns.en: Yes, or come back after four when it's shorter.

turns.cn: 小孩身高够吗？一米三五。
turns.en: Is my kid tall enough? One thirty-five centimeters.

turns.cn: 够，入口有身高尺。
turns.en: Yes. There's a height check at the entrance.

turns.cn: 包放哪？
turns.en: Where do we leave bags?

turns.cn: 免费储物柜在入口左边。
turns.en: Free lockers on the left at the entrance.

title: Lost Child
scene: 孩子在乐园走散了，你去客服中心求助。

turns.cn: 我孩子走丢了，七岁，穿蓝T恤。
turns.en: I lost my child. Seven years old, blue T-shirt.

turns.cn: 别慌，请描述长相和名字。
turns.en: Stay calm. Describe him and his name.

turns.cn: 叫小明，黑色短发，戴眼镜。
turns.en: His name is Tommy. Short black hair and glasses.

turns.cn: 我们广播了，失散儿童中心在这边。
turns.en: We've announced it. Lost children center is this way.

turns.cn: 谢谢你们反应这么快。
turns.en: Thank you for responding so quickly.

turns.cn: 找到了，您儿子在接待处。
turns.en: We found him. Your son is at the desk.

turns.cn: 太好了！
turns.en: Thank goodness!

title: Water Park
scene: 你在水上乐园租储物柜和浮圈。

turns.cn: 储物柜一天十二，押金二十。
turns.en: Lockers are twelve for the day, twenty deposit.

turns.cn: 小孩浮圈要租吗？
turns.en: Do kids need rented tubes?

turns.cn: 浅水区免费，漂流河要租。
turns.en: Free in the shallow pool. Lazy river requires rental.

turns.cn: 防晒霜能带进去吗？
turns.en: Can we bring sunscreen in?

turns.cn: 可以，玻璃瓶装不行。
turns.en: Yes, but no glass bottles.

turns.cn: 滑水道几点关？
turns.en: What time do the slides close?

turns.cn: 六点，六点前排队。
turns.en: Six PM. Get in line before then.
